name: build-loop
description: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop (Assess → Plan → Execute → Review → Iterate) plus optional Learn phase. Review combines critic, validate, optimize, fact-check, simplify, and report as ordered sub-steps. Includes a Codex subagent adapter without changing Claude Code runtime agents.

interface.shortDescription: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop with review gates and a Codex subagent adapter.
interface.longDescription: Orchestrated 5-phase development loop (Assess → Plan → Execute → Review → Iterate) plus optional Learn phase. Review combines critic, validate, optimize, fact-check, simplify, and report as ordered sub-steps. Includes a Codex subagent adapter without changing Claude Code runtime agents.
